definition: A group of countries working together.
example: Like a big school club with students from many classes.

definition: An organization helping keep peace in conflict areas.
example: Like teachers sent to stop playground fights.
Like teamwork during a group project.
Like volunteers giving food after a storm.
Like tutors helping students improve.
Like doctors helping an entire school stay healthy.
Like students cleaning the park.
Like referees for trading games.

definition: Organizations for countries in one region.
example: Like a club for students from the same neighborhood.

definition: Countries that belong to an organization.
example: Like club members.
Like a club rulebook.
Like a club president.

definition: Teams sent to help other countries.
example: Like volunteers helping another school.
Like a meeting to settle class disputes.

definition: Countries watching but not full members.
example: Like guests at a club meeting.
Like school funding for clubs.
Like clubs collaborating on events.
Like donating supplies to a friend.
Like a big student council meeting.
Like school goals for better learning.
